---
title: Key concepts
---

A handful of words appear throughout this manual: **model**, **mappers**,
**metadata**, and **bundle**. This page will explain each in plain language so the
later steps make sense.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #4](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/4).
:::
